objective: Encourage questions after the March 27 feed post
visual_intent: strong readability with wide breathing room
brand_guardrails: maintain continuity with the approved March 27 feed carousel
use the Set 1 color and typography system
keep typography stable across all 3 frames
preserve top and bottom safe zones
do not generate fake question-box UI or placeholder rectangles
keep frame 3 open in the lower third for the native sticker
keep text darkness, opacity, and weight visually consistent across all 3 frames
composition: one short message block per frame
full-canvas white-card feel with minimal mist-blue edge atmosphere
very light internal support motif only when needed
frame 3 must reserve lower-third space for the native Question Sticker
reference_strategy: Use the approved March 27 feed cover as the ingredient-continuity anchor, and the March 23 Set 1 story as the story-behavior anchor. Keep the story lighter and more conversational than the feed while preserving the same premium border logic and typographic calmness.
variation_guardrails: do not clone the feed card layout literally
keep the frames lighter and more conversational than the feed
use a softer and more open support motif than the feed cover
avoid any hard science icon becoming the focal point
frame 3 should feel like an invitation, not a sales CTA

batch_lock.text_color: dark charcoal, visually consistent across all frames
batch_lock.weight_presence: same medium-weight feel across all frames

slides_ja: 気になることがあれば、ここから少しずつ整理していけます。
気になる質問を送ってください

notes: March 27 question-box story. Keep it inside the Set 1 family but lighter than the feed. Reserve lower-third space on frame 3 for the native Instagram Question Sticker with prompt text: 気になることを送ってください.
